message:
Add conformance fixtures for 22 additional primitives (596/596 parity)

Covers bitwise shifts (ShiftLeft, ShiftRightArithmetic, ShiftRightLogical),
shape/index ops (DynamicSlice, DynamicUpdateSlice, Split, BroadcastedIota),
advanced ops (While, Switch, Argsort, OneHot, ReduceWindow), and utility
ops (BitcastConvertType, ReducePrecision, Gather). Total conformance now
571 transform + 25 RNG = 596 cases, 85+ primitives, 100% pass.

Closes bd-m6p9, bd-izok, bd-21vb, bd-4mxc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
